top_opportunities.title: Make it easier to write reliable cleanup tasks
top_opportunities.body_preview: [](https://issuehunt.io/r/avajs/ava/issues/928) See: https://github.com/avajs/ava/pull/918#issuecomment-227016238 `after.always` has some issues when used as a cleanup task. Specifically, it won't run if: - There are test failures and `--fail-fast` is used. - There are uncaught exceptions thrown. I've advocated using `.before` or `.beforeEach` to ensure s

top_opportunities.title: Replace ban text with localizable message
top_opportunities.body_preview: [](https://issuehunt.io/r/FAForever/server/issues/640) The server should not be sending any strings that get rendered in the client, because these strings are in English and we can't be sure that the user on the other end has their client set to English (in fact a majority of people probably knows English only as a second language, or does no

top_opportunities.title: Bounty
top_opportunities.body_preview: Here's a complete English bounty post template you can copy, paste, and adapt. It's designed to be easily parsed by bots (e.g., GitHub Actions, Discord "action board" scrapers) and follows typical Lean/Mathlib collaboration style. ```markdown [Bounty] $XXX – Formalize (or disprove) the "Prime Emergence Conjecture" ## Problem in plain language I propose a new conjecture related to prime emergence. *(Replace the following with your actual conjecture – keep it concise and precise)* **Conjecture (na

top_opportunities.title: Optional: capital-aware pre-trade /review (advisory) as an MCP tool
top_opportunities.body_preview: QuantScope's comprehensive workflow for AI-driven stock analysis could benefit from an optional enhancement: integrating a pre-trade verdict system like /review. This feature provides a capital-scale-aware verdict (approve/approve_with_concerns/reject) before committing funds, complementing your current research and decision-making process without altering your authoritative architecture. Our own live Bitcoin bot uses this gate for every entry, with outcomes logged in a public, on-chain-verifiab

top_opportunities.title: Build automated bounty aggregator
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Description Create an automated system to discover and aggregate bounties from multiple platforms. ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Multi-platform scraping - [ ] Deduplication logic - [ ] Real-time updates - [ ] Source attribution - [ ] Quality filtering

top_opportunities.title: Expand the tool schema into a full vendor-assessment profile
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Why Today each tool carries four compliance flags (SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA). That is a thin slice of what someone actually needs before adopting or buying a tool. AIFoxx's promise is "Trust the data" - so a tool page should answer a real vendor due-diligence checklist in one place, the way a security or procurement professional would assess a vendor before purchase. ## Proposal Grow the schema in `src/types/tool.ts` additively. Every new field is optional and nullable, and any positive
